description: Originated in Q4 2014, USDT is a USD-pegged stablecoin, without the claimed backup as later discovered by a New York court. Its reserves are now mainly backed by US T-bills. As a 1:1 USDT-pegged token on AtlantisChain — the world’s ONLY ultra-super-fast Layer-0 blockchain with 3,600,000 TPS and 0.031-second block time — ATC-20 USDT delivers instant finality, fixed ultra-low gas fees, unmatched TPS, and AI contract capability, making it a faster, more secure, and more scalable asset worldwide.
name: USDT on AtlantisChain
